task_description: Phase 21: Implement an Offline-First CRDT Sync Engine package (@quant/sync-engine) with Yjs document/list wrappers, structured state management, WebSocket+HTTP sync protocol, conflict resolution, IndexedDB local persistence, service worker offline queuing, and sync status management.

verification.summary: TypeScript strict typecheck passes. All 83 tests pass across 8 test files. Review v2 issues addressed: flushQueue no longer drops messages, CRDTState validates refined schemas, and new tests cover queue eviction, error callbacks, and connection state changes.
